# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the documentation change and why it is needed.

## Changed Areas

- Root governance
- Docs
- Volume
- ADR
- Templates
- Diagrams
- GitHub workflow

## Review Checklist

- [ ] I read `docs/MASTER_CONTEXT.md`.
- [ ] I read `docs/ROADMAP.md`.
- [ ] I followed `docs/STANDARDS.md`.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` when the change is notable.
- [ ] I updated `docs/MASTER_CONTEXT.md` when status, scope, or next work changed.
- [ ] I checked terminology against `docs/GLOSSARY.md`.
- [ ] I avoided placeholder content, filler, and unsupported claims.

## Follow-Up Work

List follow-up work that should be tracked separately.
